hc312bef3g2288g4af3gadb0g6f3bcb778e1a: *You look at the Selûnite offerings. Nothing but profane baubles.*
hd0ac351bg6d11g4b61g8846g61fe40dd9458: *Still, they could be traded for something valuable.*
h228ecca9g25b4g40e8ga8dag4f1791b0a0d4: *But would Shar agree? Would she see it as accepting Selûnite gifts? Difficult to say.*
hb626cc93ged2eg4b0fgaf5bgd0a39a96031b: To even touch that filth would be to dishonour Shar.
hf6c9460bg2d4fg4421ga9dfg0e8bec44cace: *But would Shar agree? She may be pleased to see offerings to Selûne stolen. Difficult to say.*
he5443f99gf624g4c61gaacfg12581049c44f: *You look at the Selûnite offerings. Nothing but profane baubles.*
h3f3f9b11gdf38g45ffga397g24465e98ec9b: *Still, they could be traded for something valuable.*
heee499e6gfcf1g40ccgac9dg5b70901a4a24: *But would Shar agree? Would she see it as accepting Selûnite gifts? Difficult to say.*
h709a4e17g0395g436dgafaag0611ef52a81c: You should leave it. Or even destroy it, if possible.
h67045322ge454g49ffg8cb7gc7050b9cbc1e: This rubbish is an offering to Selûne. At best, it's worthless. At worst... who knows? Could be cursed.
hec9ff1a8g2428g46cfg9574g1db7b01a921e: Do not trifle with that moon witch or her trinkets. Only trouble will follow.
h030a3b30gc4d5g45f5gb767g85baad461afb: Why do you care so much?
he19164e8g3bcbg4f2bg9be1g9bdea7969fb7: I should've just stayed quiet. You want the truth? Fine.
h5dd620f4gb9c5g4818gbb3ag7fef794dc582: I worship Shar, Mistress of the Night - Selûne's twin and foe.
h55ef29begdc38g4a93ga306g1a7ff03a9a99: Because we've enough troubles and burdens as it is. Common sense, that's all.
h3c8abf3dg0178g4114g9fe6g34636deac9e0: You're hiding something. You worship Shar, don't you?
h49e91aa6g4a1cg456dgbbe0g1348c12b6968: ... I should have been more discreet around you, clearly. Yes, you're right.
h0b7f3930g1224g411fg842fgda0411db8bfb: Don't make a fuss, Selûnite - we may be at odds, but I have more important concerns than you right now.
hd27d430bg0bc1g423ag808bgbdefa209c2f7: Don't make a big fuss...? You've been lying to me!
h932733adg6a7bg4379ga438g262e24f12bf2: A lie of omission at most. I'm sure you have some skeletons of your own hidden away.
hf2dcfff6gc5c4g47e9ga6f0g7f1281306234: Secrecy is everything for Shar's children. It's our code, our creed, our shield.
h75e6320ag310ag4c2fgbe90ga2b894f6da0b: I even keep secrets from myself - I had my memories suppressed, so that nothing I knew could be used against the Dark Lady. Once I prove myself, my memories will be restored.
h8cf8e54bg05a2g4283g9893g4e11bc5fcdbb: I'm not sorry I kept this from you. Not one bit.
hc01b6bc3g2334g439bg8e7eg2c7ae6bb81e2: Though perhaps that might change, if you can show an open mind.
h410f816eg71a7g4023ga42dg035903e53a1b: Let's see how open-minded I can be then: tell me more.
hcabd5ae1gbe8bg4c11g8609g345299e9aaf0: Talk to me later. We've got more pressing matters to see to right now.
h4e126274gb7d5g4182gb5b0g46b53bfc05ce: We can discuss this later. But let's just try a little more honesty going foward.
h1d2a3535g779fg419bgad51gca60b56cef92: All we can do is try, I suppose...
hcb56ca27gafbcg4effga93fg0e825565cd60: I don't know how I feel about this.
h0bc1ca1ag48c5g4673gaf7egff31ee76e5de: Who says you have to feel anything?
hf0a5da3dgae8fg44aagb7fdg7d684fe27867: Gather your throughts. Then perhaps we can talk some more.
h8c22bfd2g8addg4d2bgb2cagf6dd586fcdff: You could have told me. How long were you going to keep this secret?
hb880fd3cg6993g469egac87g9d2d96d0be6a: Forever, ideally. And you assume too much about what I can and cannot tell.
h82adbbc8g774dg478bg92e5gfffafa910876: I didn't agree to join up with a Shar worshipper.
h58697d39ge079g47a0gb78dg6243faf72ad5: Then it's your own fault for not asking.
h4078be46gb5a5g4ad8gb95bgbcb6d85cd381: Now that the truth's out, tell me more.
h76d969e6ga102g42b4gb0dag1ca29e1cef84: It's been some time since I met another faithful of Shar. Are you versed in her teachings?
h7cf9c73bg6bffg4cf5ga14cgef9f5285e64e: Of course I am. But we can talk about this later - let's go.
h8d494fa3gb993g44aeg82d3gd24c00f9136a: In future, I expect you to be honest. Let's leave it at that for now.
hbafbb80cg5119g4ee1g9476ge71eac914c87: I can't trust you. Best if we travel separately for now.
h6a957ac9gac03g47f7gb8a0g3aa0ef073743: If you insist. Don't expect to fare well without me to save you.
hf1a387f6gfe95g48e0g982dg94f579d0d367: I don't care who you worship. We have bigger problems.
hb5089dabgd483g4754g8933g80676782a53c: True. I didn't think you'd react so pragmatically. Perhaps I should have told you sooner.
hef64e78eg5734g4a5fgadf4gc24af75f2c67: Shar is an abomination. You deceived me.
h6605ada6ge2dbg4ab6gbbddg812047124537: Your blindness as much as my deception, Selûnite. We can talk about this later - if you're willing.
hcd5b21a5g5c00g42cdgaae1ge2e222b7d72a: I bow to Shar also. The Dark Lady must favour us, to have brought us together.
h98615551g16b8g4199g865agba50817ba341: I... yes, she must. I'll offer thanks to her in my prayers - and we should speak more later. Alone, ideally.
h7437e203gfb24g418ag989bged04f0bb4a38: Fantastic. Monsters in our minds, and around our campfire.
h6193656cg0178g46a7g8060g16c31a0d8ff1: Heavens forbid. We're all entitled to our secrets.
haee90f53gefc5g4e3ag86e4g8a9c8ceb906d: Knew there was something off about you. Wasn't expecting this though
h42c39e91ga9bfg4507g8db7g552b846d65a9: A Shar worshipper? Not my usual quarry - nor my usual ally.
h2e0998fbg825fg4523g95b7ga947e9bd2564: You worship Shar? Blimey. She and my beloved Mystra are not exactly friends.
hc461f7e6g70bcg4f34gab6fg600e07a6b0e1: Now that you have the truth, please don't make a big fuss about it.
h732d14aagbaefg4833gb373g2439af6db124: There's more. Use your parasite and enter her thoughts. Look for what she's hiding.
ha62f6444g83bcg4dbeg9bb8g29245a84f7cb: *She's repelled by the Selûnite relics. They are an offence to her goddess - Shar.*
h1cb85c88g4c70g4e3aga2f5g1e2955097c1d: Agh - I can feel you, idiot. Keep out of my skull or I'll break yours open.
h157cb045g3f2fg4557gaed8g9658a3ecbaef: I'll do as I please. If you want to try stopping me, be my guest.
hc9b22304g6cf7g449bgac27g682fe5a4e891: Fine. Perhaps you can sell them for a couple of coins.
h584909d3g0d0dg427bgba73gab072a412efb: Take them if you must. But I'll remember you didn't listen to sense.
hab60a835gec8fg43ffg91f6gb5294cb3b99b: We can't just abandon resources that we might need. Be sensible.
hed64974bgce09g4827g9c58gb4b4fcb81db6: That's twice you've spoken ill of my goddess. Watch your mouth.
ha27062d0g24ecg4783gb613g9ce74c66a30d: I almost pity her, if you're the quality of follower she attracts.
h887782fbgdcd0g4603ga280gb536fe19a7f7: That's my patron goddess you're besmirching. Watch your mouth.
h14bfd304ga575g4e85g83d0gcbab1ab73029: You were just about to loot this shrine - don't pretend you'e offended now.
h406e3f45g44c5g492bg823bg0fabd82b056d: Trifling with that moon witch will only bring you trouble. Shar's guidance is clear.
h01c9d8cag1badg4348gb6adgf30d38c672b4: I'll do as I please. If you want to try stop me, be my guest.
h0ca06a93gc7fcg4257g93c4g9569946e7ecd: We're in no position to abandon resources. I'm sure Shar will understand.
hc30abba1g8b77g4456ga6fbgc05cf25611f3: No, this is perfect. You get to spite Selûne by stealing gifts meant for her.
h71efe3edge9d2g4aa1gb52bgd3e3ce231e9e: Watch your mouth, Sharran. That's twice you've spoken ill of my goddess.
h9c484801g53ecg4e41ga266g87acabaf48f2: Spare me the indignity - you looked set to loot this sad little shrine.
hdc9e7678gcddeg4336gbda0g8307196c7029: I never knew Selûne's followers were quite so wretched. Do as you please.
h120482abgb2e8g4c11g9276g7f03b01fe9ec: That's my patron goddess you're besmirching. Watch your mouth, Sharran.
h6541ad3agb908g4bebg859egef6b26f0bcee: If it matters that much to you, I'll leave it.
hc1e9c59fga630g4443g8e86g09886143f4ff: Don't be ridiculous - there could be something useful here.
h5bec341bg37c2g4ce6g811dg126796324272: These are offerings to Selûne. I won't destroy them.
hbdccf074g878fg418dg8b8fg1feb3be8f70c: But you'll steal them? An interesting way to show your devotion.
h33a13757g3f8ag4618gb432g23878662b4cb: I do. Thank you for understanding.
